name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter, sugar, juice, and zest in a mixing bowl. Cover with plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
3. Remove from the microwave and stir well.
4. Whisk 1/4 cup of this mixture into the eggs until warm.
5. Whisking constantly, pour the egg mixture back into the remaining lemon mixture.
6. Cook uncovered on high for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Whisk until smooth.
8. Microwave for 2 more minutes longer.
9. Remove from heat and immediately transfer to a food processor. Process for 30 seconds.
10. Allow to cool before serving.
Makes 1 cup.
